scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.ci:all: npm ci && npm ci --prefix client && npm ci --prefix server
scripts.build: rimraf ./dist && npm run make:license && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build && node copyFiles.mjs
scripts.build:debug: rimraf ./dist && npm run make:license && npm --prefix client run build:debug && npm --prefix server run build && node copyFiles.mjs
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev"
